theScene: You begin to climb the steps of the grand staircase, and after what feels like several minutes of panting effort, you eventually reach the top and find yourself standing before a set of imposing double doors, stylized with a pair of demon's faces on them, one red, one blue.

After taking a small moment to catch your breath, you move forwards and push them open, but are immediately blinded by a bright beam of sunlight shining from inside, and as soon as your vision clears you can see a small flight of stairs leading down into a well lit arena with two tall colored platforms on each side, blue on the left and red on the right.

After taking a small moment to catch your breath, you move forwards and push them open, but are immediately blinded by a bright beam of moonlight shining from inside, and as soon as your vision clears you can see a small flight of stairs leading down into a well lit arena with two tall colored platforms on each side, blue on the left and red on the right.
You walk down the stairs while you take another few heartbeats to observe your surroundings, and soon you're standing in the center of the arena.

You stand around for several moments as nothing happens and silence fills the room, and you almost wonder if the boss of the dungeon isn't even here right now until you suddenly hear the platforms to your sides creak loudly as something shifts on each of them, and you jerk your head up to see what's causing the noise.

The towering forms of two women standing atop the platforms dominate your vision as the sun shining behind them makes it so that you can only see their indistinct silhouettes and glowing yellow eyes, but you aren't given any more time to try to figure out who they are as they simultaneously leap off of their perches and land in the center of the arena with a thunderous crash, filling the area with a cloud of sight-blocking dust.

You take an involuntary step back as the two sets of eerie demonic eyes pierce through the obscuring dirt floating in the air and fixate on you with menacing intensity. A boisterous laugh intermixes with a low, sinister chuckle as the dust slowly clears, giving you the faintest glimpse of their two towering bodies through the haze as the louder voice begins to ring across the arena.
AHAHAHA! Foolish human! You dare come to challenge {i}us{/i}?! Do you even know who we are?!
The second, much more subdued and thoughtful sounding voice rings out from within the cloud of dust just after the first one finishes.
Together, we are the second commander of the Demon Queen, the-
The first voice interrupts the second one with a deafening cry, making you wince from the sheer volume while she bellows.
{i}{b}The Undefeatable Frozen Flame! The Unending Volcanic Blizzard! THE ONI TWINNNSSS OF TERRRROOORRRR!!!{/i}{/b}

The dust filling the room begins to clear as an almost oppressive silence fills the air in the aftermath of their introduction, and you can see two onis standing in front of you, one red and one blue as the blue one gives the red one an exasperated, almost irritated look.
Sister... That was {i}my{/i} line, and those were absolutely not the titles that we agreed on...
The red oni looks away from you to face her sister with a look of challenge as her eyes gleam, and the blue oni crosses her arms as she glares right back at her.
Yeah, but I say it better than you do, and we both know that the titles {i}I{/i} came up with are way better than the ones you did anyway.

You can almost feel the tension in the air as both of the towering women scowl at each other for a long moment in annoyance, but just as suddenly as they began to argue with one another, the red oni turns back to you with a vicious grin as she clears her throat and begins to bellow once more.
But just before she can build up steam and pick up where she left off, the blue oni looks at you and cuts her off with a conversational voice.
She's Himika and I am Mizuko.
Himika's already red face turns an even brighter shade of crimson as she frowns in annoyance and whirls to face her sister.
Wh- Bu-?! What about the rest of the speech?! You can't go on about me cutting you off then just cut {i}me{/i} off like that!

Well {i}someone{/i} already went off script, so I thought that we could do anything we want now. I was just thinking about how {i}irritating{/i} it would be to have your sister steal your thunder for the dramatic introduction you'd agonized over for {i}such{/i} a long time.
Mizuko gives her sister a sideways glance with a smirk.
But I'm sure that doesn't sound familiar...?

Himika throws her arms into the air in frustration before crossing them and turning to face the wall with a huff, and Mizuko's mouth curves into a victorious smile and she stares at her for a moment before looking over at you once more.
So, now that we've got our own introductions out of the way, would you care to introduce yourself while my sister pouts?

The sudden shift from ominous intimidation to familial bickering throws you off so much that you can't help but look back and forth between the two onis in baffled confusion as you give them your name.
[ThePlayerName]? Nice to meet you. Now then, getting down to business. If you want the sigil of Will-Power, you're going to have to defeat one of us in combat. Who would you rather prefer to face?
Himika perks up as soon as her sister mentions 'combat' and whirls to face you, looking fired up as any hint of her earlier sulking seems to have completely disappeared.
Yeah, who's it going to be?!
Mizuko lets out a small cough to get your attention, and you look at her as she points to a glowing circle engraved into the floor near the wall.
You can use that to heal up before the fight if you want, by the way. You don't want to go into this with a handicap. Trust me.
But enough talking, hurry up and pick one of us already!
Your gaze shifts back and forth between the energetic Himika and the calm Mizuko as you consider your options...
AHAHAHA! Foolish human! You dare come to challenge us?! Do you...! W-Wait! H-Hold on a second! I-Is t-that-?!
The first voice trails off with a sputtering cough as a more subdued and slightly sarcastic voice rings out from the cloud of dust.
...Really sis? You're going to mess up our introduction on the very first line? That's a new record.

As the dust in the air quickly settles, you can see the towering crimson figure on the right rush over to the other, tall blue individual and grab them by the shoulders, shaking them violently as they yell out in a panicked voice.
You recognize the onis from your time working in the brothel back in town as the red one continues to shake the other while throwing almost comically terrified glances towards you.
S-So what?! A-And stop s-shaking me already!

You faintly remember that these two people are sisters as the blue oni lightly shoves the towering red woman away, causing her to stumble backwards before she takes a step forwards, closing the distance to point an accusing finger at her sister.
Y-You said I wouldn't have to worry about seeing him outside of that place!

Your attempts to speak are all but completely ignored as the blue oni straightens and focuses squarely on her sister, and you manage to notice that she's barely, but still noticeably taller than her sister.
No, I said that you probably wouldn't see him {i}here{/i}. Besides, shouldn't you be happy that he showed up? Isn't he the one you have a cru-

The red oni's already burning face turns an even brighter shade of crimson as her hand abruptly darts up and covers her sister's mouth, cutting her words off with a muffled cry of indignation as she immediately tries to pry her sisters fingers from her face.
SH-SHUT UP MIZUKO! HE'S {i}RIGHT THERE{/i}! Are you trying to ruin my reputation as a badass? He- GYAH?!
The red oni lets out a shriek as she pulls her hand away from Mizuko's mouth, giving her sister a disgusted look as she wipes her hand onto her leg while Mizuko angrily glares at her sister.
D-Did you just fucking {i}lick my hand{/i}?! What are you, five?!
Mizuko brings her arm up to wipe her mouth as she glares at her sister, taking a step towards her as she practically butts heads with her.
Well, it was that or bite it, and I didn't want to make things weird when you moaned from it. You're my sister, Himika, so it'd be {i}weird{/i} if you got off from-
Himika lets out a piercing shriek, cutting off Mizuko's words as she shoves a finger into her sister's chest.
{i}What are you talking about{/i}?! YOU'RE the one who gets off from pain, not me!
Mizuko slaps Himika's finger away from her with a smug smile as she takes a step forwards, forcing her sister to backpedal as she punctuates her words with each footstep she makes.

Oh? But I'm not embarrassed by this fact, I own up to it. But if you want to go that route, let's not forget that you're the kind of person who melts into a puddle the moment someone starts playing with your ass. Don't think I haven't heard the noises you make in your room at night.
Himika sputters in flustered indignation as she blushes more intensely than ever, and her voice rises in pitch as it takes on a slightly panicked tone.

W-What?! No, I don't l-like butt stuff, what are you t-talking about?! That's {i}your{/i} thing, and I wouldn't want to... to overshadow you or anything, so there's no way that I-I'm into that, o-okay?!
Mizuko lets out a quick bark of laughter at her sister's flushed expression before smugly staring into her eyes.

You think I never connected the dots when you asked me all those 'innocent' questions about the best ways to apply all my anal techniques when you did nothing to hide your blatant interest? Next thing I know, you're going to be-

Your faint interjection causes both of them to immediately stop their bickering and look at you with matching bashful expressions for several long moments, and as the silence stretches on, you notice that Himika's face is significantly more flushed than her sister's.

...Sooooo... I guess that the grand introduction we planned has been completely ruined, huh? Sorry about that. I'm Mizuko, and this big spaz over here is my little sister Himika. Nice to finally meet you outside of that brothel, [ThePlayerName].
Mizuko gestures to Himika, who gives you a meek wave with a small, embarrassed smile.
Mizuko cuts you off with a dismissive wave of her hand before you can even finish speaking.

The owner of the brothel mentioned your name, Shizu can't seem to shut up about you, and some of the other workers here in the temple have been talking about you as you've been going through the challenges. We've had a lot of different ways, but they aren't really that important. Normally we'd let you introduce yourself to avoid sounding creepy, but {i}someone{/i} decided to go off script.
How was I supposed to keep my composure when I figured out it was [ThePlayerName]?! A-And wait, does this mean that we're not doing the full introduction?
That's what you're hung up on? Really? It's a little late for that, don't you think?
Himika dramatically clears her throat and strikes a dynamic pose as she lets out a ringing bellow.
{i}Together, we are the second commander of the Demon Queen, {b}The Undefeatable Frozen Flame! The Unending Volcanic Blizzard! THE ONI TWINS OF TERRRROOOORRRR!!!{/i}{/b}

An awkward silence fills the air as both you and Mizuko stare at Himika, and you notice a small trickle of nervous sweat creep down her brow as both your and Mizuko's gazes bore into her while she motionlessly remains in her pose.
...You really need to stop trying to impress [ThePlayerName] so much.
Himika's composure instantly crumbles at her sister's words as she turns to stare at her with a flushed glare.
S-Shut the hell up! I am {i}not{/i} trying to impress him!
Mizuko continues to give Himika a flat look for a few more heartbeats before letting out a tired sigh and looking over at you.

Anyways... [ThePlayerName], under normal circumstances we're supposed to challenge you to fight us, but considering this has gone so far off the rails on top of the fact that you've technically made both me and my sister cum quite a few times outside of this arena already, I suppose we can just give you the sigil now if you want.

Himika's jaw drops as she lets out a few sputtering noises of indignation, and after a few unsuccessful, stammering attempts to talk, she finally manages to speak as her piercing voice goes a full octave beyond from her normal tone.
{i}W-What?!{/i} You give me so much grief for going off script earlier and you just want to hand him the sigil without a fight?! Even after all that effort I just put into this thing?!
Why not? Nothing I said was wrong, was it? And besides, if he's not fighting for the sigil, he might be more inclined to 'enjoy' spending some time with us to repay us, right?
Himika's face turns an even deeper shade of red than it already was as Mizuko gives you a conspiratorial wink.

O-Oh, I g-guess you have a p-point... Uhm... Well, I guess if you want, [ThePlayerName], you can take the sigil, but I would prefer to have a pitched battle for it, honestly. It seems more climactic to me that way, but it's up to you at the end of the day I suppose...
Himika flushes even more intensely than before as she trails off and averts her gaze, and Mizuko gives you a level look as her voice becomes far more serious for a moment.
I'm only offering this once, so if you refuse you're going to have to beat one of us to get it the good old-fashioned way. What'll it be?
Mizuko gives you a curt nod before looking over at her sister, and Himika pouts before begrudgingly pulling a small badge out of her clothes and tosses it over to you, which you effortlessly catch.

You take a look at the sigil as you feel its weight in your hand, and you notice that it's a small badge with a ruby and a sapphire shaped like curved teardrops set in the middle, twining around each other in a fancy yet delicate manner.

Well, at least you {i}think{/i} that the gems are a ruby and a sapphire. You can't help but notice that they feel slightly off when compared to gems you've touched in the past, and they don't seem to sparkle as well underneath the sunlight of the room as you feel they should...

Either way, you store it away after inspecting it for a few moments longer, and once you're done you look back up at Himika and Mizuko, who are idly standing around as they share an awkward glance before they stare at you while Himika lets out a small cough.
Well... There you go. So... Uh... Is there anything else you wanted to do while you're here? I mean, you did get the sigil and all, but... You know...
Mizuko barely manages to stifle a laugh at her sister's flushed expression, and after getting herself under control she flashes Himika a toothy grin.
Still raring for a fight, eh sis? Well, it's up to [ThePlayerName] if he wants. Who knows? He might be crazy enough to try and fight both of us at once.
Pfft. He wouldn't stand a chance against the two of us together. I know from all the fighting we do with one another that nobody would be able to handle you with {i}me{/i} backing your ass up.
Himika fiercely smiles back at Mizuko, and Mizuko lets out a booming laugh as she lightly punches her sister in the shoulder.
You're selling yourself short, sis. I've seen how killer you can be with your chest. Together, we're unstoppable.
The oni twins take a few moments longer to grin at one another before letting out a few chuckles and turning back to look at you once more.
You're free to do whatever you want now, [ThePlayerName]. You can stick around to chat if you feel like it, or maybe you're feeling ballsy enough to actually try to take us both on, hmm?

Mizuko remains quiet for a few seconds longer until her face breaks out into a small, fierce smile, and her eyes momentarily gleam as she briefly looks back at her sister, who much more openly grins as she eagerly stares at you.

Oh? I guess you're the kind of person who prefers to work for their rewards instead of just having them handed to you. I can't say I don't understand that mindset. Or are you just saying that because you want to give Himika what she wants?
Yeah! Alright! So which one of us are you going to fight, [ThePlayerName]?! I'm so excited to... Wait a minute, what was that last bit you said sis?

Mizuko turns to face you once more as her sister gives her a suspicious glare, preventing Himika from seeing her expression, but you can't help but notice the teasing glint in her eyes as she gets her face under control before speaking up again.

Hm? Nothing, sister. I didn't say anything at all. But getting back to business, if you don't feel that you're quite up for fighting us yet, there's a magic circle over there by the wall if you want to heal up, or you can leave and come back at any time if you're feeling unprepared. No matter what your decision is, we're ready to go whenever you are.

You glance to your side and see the glowing circle engraved into the floor, just as Mizuko mentioned it would be, and you look at the energetic Himika and calm Mizuko as they both grin at you, considering what you should do next.
Himika and Mizuko are standing in the center of the arena, idly chatting to one another until they notice you walking towards them, trailing off as they turn to face you.
As you continue to approach them, they both flash you a set of intimidatingly toothy grins, and Mizuko ominously cracks her knuckles as you wind up standing directly in front of them.
Ha! I bet he's only here to get fucked senseless.

As you continue to approach them, Himika flushes as her eyes meet yours for a second, averting her gaze and fidgeting nervously as Mizuko chuckles under her breath as she stares at her suddenly timid little sister.
So, uhm... [ThePlayerName]? About the whole 'massage at the brothel' thing, uh...
Mizuko suddenly chimes in with a broad smile, cutting off her sister as her eyes twinkle mischievously.
My sister wants you to massage her like you did back in town and then fuck her utterly senseless nonstop all night every single day for the rest of her life, [ThePlayerName].

Himika's face turns a brilliant shade of crimson as her head jerks upwards to stare at her now openly laughing sister with an expression of disbelief as she incoherently sputters for a few moments before managing to speak.
WH-YOU! I- {b}TH-THAT WAS NOT AT ALL WHAT I WAS GOING TO SAY!{/b}
Mizuko's laughter only becomes more uproarious at her sister's angry outburst, and as Himika shoots a death glare towards her sister, it only makes Mizuko's laughs become increasingly raucous.

It takes Mizuko several long minutes to calm herself down as Himika's anger slowly starts to fade away but she's looking away pouting furiously, and eventually Mizuko manages to get herself under control as she turns away from her sister to face you once more.
...Hehe... So [ThePlayerName], what brings you here anyways, perhaps you're here to give us at home massages?
Himika's face manages to turn an even brighter red as she still looks away from you and her sister...
As you continue to approach them, Himika gives you a small, bashful grin while Mizuko flashes you a sly smirk.
Heh! I bet he's just here to have some fun with me. And uh... You too, sis.
Mizuko just rolls her eyes and lets out a small sigh, but doesn't say anything as she looks over at you expectantly.
Ask to fuck the oni sisters.
Go back to the kunoichi training hall.
Fight both of them at the same time! (Hard)
Himika's face breaks into a fierce smile as she eagerly cracks her knuckles while Mizuko calmly walks towards a nearby wall to watch what happens next.

It doesn't take long for a flushing Himika to step through a concealed door in the wall of the arena and march her way back to the center with a pout as Mizuko chuckles to herself and walks up to her sister.
Himika blinks in surprise and shares a glance with her sister for a moment before looking back at you.
Huh? Y-You only want to fight me, but you want me to use Mizuko's powers? Well... Okay, I guess...

Himika turns to stare at her sister once more as they share a nod, and Mizuko closes her eyes as a wave of blue energy suddenly races from her body towards Himika's which turns red as she absorbs it, and she pivots towards you with a determined look in her eyes.
I hope you're ready for this.

Mizuko gives her sister a faint grin before she turns and carefully walks towards a nearby wall, swaying slightly as if exhausted, to watch what happens next while Himika dramatically tears the bandages off of her chest, letting her voluptuous breasts mesmerizingly bounce free as she settles into a combat stance.

Shortly after Himika fades away, a blue aura envelops Mizuko as her posture straightens, looking revitalized, and it doesn't take long for a flushing, fully clothed Himika to step through a concealed door in the wall of the arena and march her way back to the center with a pout as Mizuko chuckles to herself and walks up to her sister.
Mizuko snickers at her sister's excuse as she flashes her a knowing grin, and Himika throws Mizuko a glare before quickly regaining her composure once more.
Mizuko's face breaks into a small, smug grin as she languidly stretches before settling into a combat position while Himika turns and walks towards a nearby wall to eagerly watch what happens next.
Can you muster the will to resist me?

It doesn't take long for Mizuko to step through a concealed door in the wall of the arena with a satisfied sigh and struts towards the center with a small smile as Himika walks up to her sister with a faint flush coloring her face.
Mizuko looks faintly surprised for a brief moment, sharing a quick glance with her sister before she flashes you a relaxed, somewhat sultry smile.
Hmm? You want me to borrow Himika's powers to fight you? Sure, why not.

She turns to Himika once more as they share a nod, and Himika closes her eyes as a wave of red energy suddenly races from her body towards Mizuko's which turns blue as she absorbs it, and she pivots towards you with a calm, yet incredibly threatening look in her eyes.
It'll make it that much easier to beat you, after all.

Himika smiles weakly before she turns and staggers towards a nearby wall to watch what happens next, looking incredibly tired while Mizuko deftly grabs the gourd on her hip and takes a long swig of the inebriating liquid inside before attaching it back to her clothes, wiping her lips with her arm as she settles into a combat stance with a sly grin.

Shortly after Mizuko fades away, a red aura envelops Himika as her posture straightens, looking revitalized, and it doesn't take long for Mizuko to step through a concealed door in the wall of the arena with a satisfied sigh and struts towards the center with a small smile as Himika walks up to her sister with a faint flush coloring her face.
Ahh... That was fun. Let's do it again sometime.
Mizuko reaches down and pulls a small badge out of her loincloth before locking eyes with you and throwing it towards you in an underhanded toss, which you effortlessly snatch out of the air.
You glance down at the sigil in your hand, taking note of the curved teardrop design made up of a small ruby and a small sapphire twining around each other in an intricate pattern.

Well, at least you {i}think{/i} the gems are actually a ruby and a sapphire. They seem not quite as smooth as gems should be, and they don't seem to sparkle quite as much as you feel they should. You can't help but feel a small sense of déjà vu as you remember that the sigil you got from the forest dungeon felt quite similar to this one...
Sighing, you shake your head to clear your thoughts as you stow it away with the rest of your things before looking up at the oni sisters.
There you go. Good luck with the rest of your journey, [ThePlayerName], because I promise you that it's only going to get harder from this point onwards.
Feel free to come back and challenge either of us to a rematch at any time if you want, or if you're feeling exceptionally daring, you can try to take both of us on at the same time.
Mizuko lets out a small chuckle as her face twists into a wry grin.
I'm sure my sister would have fun no matter if she wins or loses, and I'm sure that you would enjoy the... 'Reward' afterwards if you actually managed to win.
Himika deeply flushes as she shoots Mizuko an angry glare, but her look only causes Mizuko to laugh harder before they both eventually settle down.
Hmm... Maybe we should try taking him on at the same time...
Himika shoots Mizuko a concerned look.
That sounds a bit mean, sis. It's [ThePlayerName]'s decision if he wants to fight both of us simultaneously, after all.

EventText.NameOfScene: Fight both of them at the same time! (Hard)
theScene: |f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|Himika|/|Base|n||f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|Mizuko|/|Smug|n|Himika flashes you a cocky grin as Mizuko smiles slyly.

Ohhh? You want to rematch us, huh?! You sure you want to try your luck again?
Uhh... A-Are you sure you want to fight both of us at once?
Hehe, well, it's his cock's funeral if he loses this time...
There's a reason why you only need to beat one of us, you know. It's your dick's funeral if you lose. Are you sure you want to do this?
Well, we tried to warn you.
Yeah, you're the one who made this decision. Don't blame us when you can't handle this.
Both Himika and Mizuko flash you fierce, almost predatory grins as they slowly settle into combat stances.

It doesn't take long for the oni sisters to stagger out of a concealed doorway in the wall of the arena one after the other and walk back towards the center, Mizuko leading as she lets out a loud, contented sigh while Himika follows her and flushes as she stares at the ground.
Ahh... That was fun, [ThePlayerName]. Let's do this again some time.
Mizuko reaches down and pulls a small badge out of her loincloth before locking eyes with you and throwing it towards you in an underhanded toss, which you effortlessly snatch out of the air.
You glance down at the sigil in your hand, taking note of the curved teardrop design made up of a small ruby and a small sapphire twining around each other in an intricate pattern.

Well, at least you {i}think{/i} the gems are actually a ruby and a sapphire. They seem not quite as smooth as a gem should be, and they don't seem to sparkle quite as much as you feel they should. You can't help but feel a small sense of déjà vu as you remember that the sigil you got from the forest dungeon felt quite similar to this one...
Sighing, you shake your head to clear your thoughts as you stow it away with the rest of your things before looking up at the oni sisters.

Himika continues to avert her gaze from you for a few moments more as she shifts her weight from foot to foot, but she takes a deep breath as she looks up at you with a hint of fiery stubbornness burning in her eyes.
Y-You just got lucky that time, [ThePlayerName]. I wasn't taking it seriously, so let's go for a rematch!
Mizuko lets out a chuckle as she steps in front of her overly eager sister, throwing a sly grin to her over her shoulder as she faces you.
Now now, sis. He beat us fair and square, and you know it. Besides, after all the hard work he put into beating us, I'm sure that he might want a... 'Reward' for his efforts.

All of Himika's competitive spirit sputters and dies away with a crimson flush as she realizes what her sister is implying, and her cheeks burn bright red as she glances over at you before staring at her feet once more.
E-Eh?! Th-That- I mean... He did... So I guess we could... I-If he wants to...

Himika trails off as she gets too embarrassed to continue, and Mizuko lets out an amused laugh at her sister's expression before returning her attention to you as her voice drops into a sultry whisper.
So what do you say [ThePlayerName]? Are you interested in some victory sex?
I-I can't believe he actually managed to beat both of us at once!
Mhmm, it {i}was{/i} rather impressive, wasn't it?
Mizuko's face suddenly brightens as she seems to remember something, and she turns to face Himika with a crafty look in her eyes.
Hey sis... Because [ThePlayerName] did such a good job just now, I'm thinking that we should probably give him 'that'...
Himika freezes with a look of incredulity, darting her gaze back and forth between her sister and you.
H-Huh?! Y-You can't be serious! We've never-
Mizuko simply cuts her sister off with a dismissive wave of her hand.
Of course I'm serious. After all, he {i}is{/i} the first person who managed to actually beat both of us at the same time.
W-Well, you aren't wrong... And I guess that's in line with... Uh... Yeah...
...Are you two saying that you want to reward me with sex after {i}defeating{/i} both of you with sex?
Himika sharply locks eyes with you as her cheeks suddenly burn bright red, and her voice rings out with a piercing, embarrassed tone.
{i}WH-WHAT?!{/i} That's not what we were talking about {i}at all{/i}!
Mizuko just chuckles, staring at your crotch as she slowly licks her lips.
Although we could always do that too...♥
Gah!? Sis, we literally just-! Okay, you know what? I'm going to go grab 'it' before this gets out of hand. Don't you dare try anything, okay?!
Himika throws a suspicious look at her sister as she swiftly turns and walks towards a nearby wall, and you let out a sigh as your curiosity begins to boil over.
Okay, what the hell are you two talking about?!
Neither of them answer your question as Himika opens a concealed door and steps through while Mizuko continues to chuckle to herself.

A short while later, Himika returns through the door she left through carefully, almost reverently carrying a small bundle of cloth in her hands, and after walking up to you, she gently unwraps the bundle and offers its contents to you.

A brilliantly glimmering black disk rests in the center of the cloth, with one side filled in by a small, curved ruby teardrop with a smaller sapphire ingrained within the largest portion of the ruby, and the two beautifully designed glittering gems almost seem to glow as you watch them...

You slowly reach out and pick it up, feeling it thrum in your hand as you're struck by the delicate craftsmanship that must have gone into its creation while you idly run your fingers over it, noting that the empty indentation on the other side of the sigil looks like it's the perfect size for another gemstone to rest.

Absentmindedly, you stow the sigil away next to the less ornate Will-Power one you already own before pausing and suddenly wondering why there are two as you turn your attention back to the two oni sisters.
I can already see the question on your lips, [ThePlayerName]. What we just gave you was the {i}real{/i} sigil of power. The one you got before was just symbolic, this one is the real deal.
You can feel your brow furrowing as your thoughts race, and you can't stop yourself from blurting out the question burning in your mind.
...If this one is real, then why did you give me the fake one earlier? And if you just gave me the 'power' half, where's the 'will' half?

Well, first off, the little badges we give out aren't {i}fake{/i} exactly, they're just poor imitations of the original. We're supposed to hold onto the true sigil and keep it out of any adventurer's hands. But... After you managed to beat both of us, which is something nobody else has managed to do, I figured that the replica wouldn't be a suitable reward.
As for the other missing half, it used to be there, but {i}somebody{/i} lost it a while back and we never managed to find it.
Mizuko takes a second to fix Himika with a flat stare, which Himika avoids as she suddenly seems to take a great interest in studying the wall.
A few more silent moments pass as you see a small trickle of nervous sweat run down Himika's forehead, and she abruptly looks over at you and takes a step towards you with a shaky smile.

...B-But that's not the important part, r-right? The important part is that we're giving you this one-of-a-kind reward that we were {i}specifically{/i} told to hold onto, and {i}Mizuko{/i} was the one who suggested giving it away in the first place. Besides, I'm sure that it'll turn up eventually, while the blame for just giving the sigil away won't, wouldn't you agree sis?

As Himika looks over her shoulder at her sister, it's clear to see that Mizuko is honestly taken aback by her sister's words, and her face slowly curves into a smile as she lets out a low, hearty chuckle before she abruptly charges forwards and locks Himika's head under her arm and into her armpit as she gives her a noogie.
G-GAH?! {i}OW!{/i} W-What the hell are you doing?!
I'll be damned, little sis! It's been a long time since you've talked me into a corner like this. Good job!

Himika doesn't respond as she lets out a growl before powerfully struggling against her sister and managing to free herself from her grasp before glowering and straightening her hair while Mizuko just laughs with a proud look on her face.
C-Can we just get back to business already?!
Don't want to take a few moments more to celebrate your victory? All right then.
Mizuko faces you once more as her expression turns serious, but with a visibly amused look underneath it.

Congratulations on defeating us both, [ThePlayerName]! I'd say that getting the real sigil was a good enough reward, but I remember you saying something a little bit earlier... Something about 'rewarding you with sex'? Ringing any bells?
Himika deeply flushes as she stares at her sister before flicking her gaze towards you and beginning to fidget profusely.
W-Well, it's up to him if he w-wants to or not, I suppose...

Aww, don't be so cagey, sis. We've both experienced firsthand how... 'Effective' [ThePlayerName] can be, and I know that you've got a... Well, I won't say anymore. So what do you say [ThePlayerName]? Are you up for some victory sex?
Himika visibly wilts as her face curves into a frown.
Well, you seem pretty disappointed, Himika. I guess you'll just have to use your imagination instead, hmm?
W-What are you talking about?! Why would I be... D-Don't be ridiculous, sis...
Himika falls silent with a flush as Mizuko lets out an uproarious laugh.
Himika lets out a disappointed sigh.
Himika lets out an almost relieved sigh.
Aww, really? I still want a rematch sometime soon, though!
Good choice, honestly. Nobody has ever managed to defeat both of us at the same time so far...
Oh? You just want to talk? Well, I suppose we weren't doing anything at the moment anyway. What did you want to discuss?
You two don't look like twins...
So about the massages at the brothel...
You two don't look like twins...
So about the massages at the brothel...
You two don't look like twins...
So about the massages at the brothel...
Yeah, I was getting bored with all the chit-chat. I'm itching for a rematch!
Yeah, that's enough chit-chat! You're going to try and fight one of us now, right?
Himika blinks at the sudden intensity of your voice and physically steps backwards with a surprised expression before tentatively beginning to speak.
Mizuko cuts her sister off with a sudden elbow in the side and a smirk, making Himika yelp in surprise.

Hey now sis, we can't just go around telling any random adventurer what we know about the Demon Queen's plans just because they asked, can we? He should at least beat one of us to prove himself first.
Himika puffs out her chest as her voice turns into an overly theatrical bellow, dramatically pointing a finger at you as she laughs.
HAHAHA! FOOLISH HUMAN! As if we would tell someone who hasn't even acquired the will-power sigil yet {i}anything{/i}!
There's a brief moment of silence as Mizuko massages her forehead with her hands before letting out a small sigh, and she looks up to fix her sister with a flat look.
...Sis, did you really need to try and be so grandiose about that? You {i}do{/i} realize that [ThePlayerName] was literally standing there as I said that. He could hear every word.
Himika glances at Mizuko as she sets her jaw stubbornly, and she crosses her arms with a haughty expression.
Of course I did! What, did you think I wasn't paying attention? We're commanders of the Demon Queen's army, sis! We need to have {i}some{/i} style to live up to our reputation, don't we?
Mizuko just lets out another tired sigh as she puts her head in her hands while darkly muttering under her breath.
...I wouldn't say we command much of an 'army', but whatever floats your boat...
Himika blinks at the sudden intensity of your voice and physically steps backwards with a surprised expression before tentatively beginning to speak.
Himika starts to trail off as her face clouds in thought, and Mizuko steps in as she gives you a serious look.

To be entirely, 100% honest, neither of us have any idea what her plans are. We haven't even met her. Every time we get orders to do something from her, they're always delivered by the Black Knight, and it's impossible to get anything out of her. All we know is that we're supposed to guard the sigil, and we're free to do whatever we want otherwise.
Himika lets out an annoyed noise as she grumbles to herself before speaking up once more.
Ugh... I'm pretty sure that we're the only commander who don't know {i}anything{/i} about her. I mean, have you {i}seen{/i} the other three? They totally know stuff!

I feel a little irritated about it too, but it's probably just because we're the newest and weakest of the commanders. You'd think Sofia wouldn't be in the first dungeon if they were doing things in order of strength, but I bet she was just too lazy to move somewhere else... And have you ever wondered why we're just called commanders? Aren't generals more important sounding?
What are you talking about, sis?! We are definitely {i}not{/i} the weakest!
Mizuko lets out a tired sigh before raising an eyebrow at her sister.
You're trying to say that we can go up against Sofia and actually manage to win? Yeah. No.
W-Well, she's... She's just an old hag, so we're younger and prettier than her, so it doesn't matter!
Mizuko laughs at her sister's almost petulant tone as she smiles widely, but you notice that her eyes are glancing towards the walls of the arena with a slight look of concern despite her mirth...
If she ever finds out you said that about her, I don't even want to know what she'd do to you. You'd better thank your lucky stars that she's as lazy as she is.
You notice the faintest flicker of uncertain fear in Himika's eyes as she looks at her sister and begins to intensely scrutinize the walls before letting out a small sigh of defeat.

Well... Fine. I guess you're right there... But I {i}do{/i} know that we're absolutely stronger than... Wait... What the fuck was her name again...? The one who's guarding the technique sigil? She's so unobtrusive that I never seem to notice her until she speaks...

Really? You've already forgotten her name? I'd say it, but I don't want to steal her thunder when [ThePlayerName] first meets her. And I would say that we're absolutely stronger than her {i}physically{/i}, but in terms of {i}magical{/i} capabilities? We can't even hold a candle against her. Besides, what she lacks in physical strength, she makes up for with her... {i}Experiments{/i}.
The color momentarily drains from Himika's face as the two sister simultaneously shudder, and Himika nervously rubs the back of her neck with a grimace as she shifts her weight from foot to foot.
You're the one trying to say that we're stronger. I'm just telling you the facts.

Yeah, well part of our thing is that we're big, strong oni, so it makes sense that we would be strong, I feel. Why is she the person guarding the technique sigil? She's more about magic and smarts, not being sneaky or skillful.
I always thought it was less about the personal characteristics of the commanders and more about what adventurers need to overcome their challenges, but I could be wrong.
Uh... That makes sense, I suppose. Okay, so Sofia is out, we're physically stronger than the technique commander, and we're probably stronger than... U-Uh...
The arena falls silent as Himika trails off with a troubled look in her eyes, and Mizuko just stares at her sister with a disbelieving, almost astonished expression.
...Are you serious right now? You forgot the third commander's name {i}AND{/i} the fourth one? Really?
N-No! It just took me a moment is all. She was the queen of the-
Mizuko cuts her sister off as she elbows her in the side, and Himika trails off with a yelp as she shoots Mizuko a dirty look.

Hey now sis, you're doing it again. First you try and casually mention the third commander's name, now you're trying to spoil the fourth one too? It's good manners to let [ThePlayerName] experience both of them firsthand.
You didn't have to elbow me so hard, sis... But you're right. Besides, I'm pretty sure that if I tried to tell [ThePlayerName] about her, she'd probably sue me or something.

Would she even need to do that? With the amount of money and power she pulls in from her casino, I'm pretty sure she could just pull a few strings and cut off our supply lines without so much as lifting a finger...
W-What? I knew she does a fair bit of logistics for the Demon Queen, but she's not {i}that{/i} powerful, i-is she...?
Mizuko gives Himika a slow, gravely serious nod.
She absolutely is. If she wanted to, she'd make sure that nothing got over here. No more imported food, no more supplies, no more books, nothing.
Himika goes rigid as a her face twists in panic, and she grabs her sister's arms as she starts to shake her wildly.
{i}{b}WHAT?!{/b}{/i} WE CAN'T LET THAT HAPPEN, SIS! I {i}CAN'T{/i} GET CUT OFF BEFORE I FIND OUT THE ENDING FOR THAT ROMANCE SERIES FROM... F-From the... Capital...

There's a moment of silence as Himika freezes before slowly turning to look at you, and her cheeks burn with embarrassment as she pushes herself away from Mizuko before studiously staring at the ground.
U-Uhm... [TPN]-[ThePlayerName]? C-Can you just forget t-that I said that...? P-Please? L-Let's talk about something else now...

EventText.NameOfScene: You two don't look like twins...
theScene: Mizuko gives you a curt nod with a serious expression.
You're right, and that's because Himika was adopted.
Himika jerks her head towards Mizuko with a stricken expression of shock and sadness, looking almost like she's about to cry.
The sound of Himika's wavering voice causes Mizuko's brow to furrow as she frowns with a concerned look, turning to face Himika as she tentatively takes a step towards her.
Wh- N-No! It was a joke, I was just trying to mess wi-
Himika snorts as she suddenly doubles over with a bout of uproarious laughter, hugely grinning at Mizuko as she wipes a tear from her face.

HA! Of course I know that we're actually related, sis! Nobody knows you like I do, so I should know better than anyone that we're sisters! You think I bought your prank? {i}You're{/i} the one who fell for the joke here!

Himika devolves into another round of laughter as Mizuko glares at her for a moment before sighing, but you can see her trying to hide a small smile from her sister as she shakes her head before getting her expression under control and looking back at you.
Yeah, yeah. You win this round, sis. But getting back to business, we really are twins, [ThePlayerName]. We look different from one another because oni biology is just weird like that.

We looked basically identical to one another when we were younger except for the color of our skin and the number of horns we had, but once puberty hit, we hit different growth spurts. Mizuko got pretty tall and her butt got really big, for example.
Yeah, and you got pretty tall too, sis. I'm still a little taller than you, but you absolutely got the boobs between the two of us, so it's not like either of us are missing out on something.
Himika flashes a toothy grin as she suddenly starts to flex her arms, making her already massive muscles bulge against her skin as she lets out a laugh.
Hehehe, but if we're talking about things one of us missed out on, I may not be as tall, but I'm sure as hell more muscular than you are!

Mizuko doesn't even seem bothered by her sister's boasting as her mouth curls up into a sly grin, and she casually brings one of her hands up to inspect her fingernails as she nonchalantly begins to speak.
You're just all muscly because you're a red oni, sis. But it's kind of weird, isn't it? I've always thought that red oni were supposed to be able to hold their booze way better than you can...
Himika abruptly stops showing off her arms as she whirls to face her sister with a haughty look of indignation.
Wh- I can hold my drinks better than anyone!
Mizuko slowly brings her hand back down to her side as she swivels to face Himika, almost looking like a cat that has cornered a mouse as her face positively radiates a smug sense of victory.
Oh really? So you're saying that you {i}don't{/i} get all emotional and shy after a single drink, and you can handle your alcohol?
You can tell that Himika seems to sense that something is off about her sister as she talks, but she's too consumed by her emotions to stop herself from speaking.
Of course not! I've never done anything like that before!
Mizuko lets out a small chuckle as her already smug expression almost turns evil as she crosses her arms and leans towards Himika.
Reaaaallly? Hm. I'll take your word for it then. I must have been misremembering about that time a little while ago when you and 'Minoni' were drinking together and talking about-
Her words are cut off as Himika lets out a panicked shriek, darting her gaze between you and her sister as her cheeks blaze while her eyes glitter with embarrassed fear.
WOAH WOAH WOAH! Hold on, sis! You swore to me that you would never speak of that to {i}anyone{/i}!
Mizuko takes an overly dramatic step backwards as she lets out a obviously fake gasp of surprise, plastering a look of complete innocence on her face as she looks at her sister.

What are you talking about? If you've never been in a situation like that, then this is all just hypothetical, right? I'm just trying to get the facts straight for this little... 'Misremembered' situation, is all. I had a memory that {i}must{/i} be fake of the two of you discussing that book series you both like, gushing and weeping over how much you two thought the pairings were cute. What was it called again? Oh right, 'Lucidian-'
Himika suddenly lunges forwards and bodily hefts her sister off the ground with surprising, yet terrifying ease, cutting Mizuko's words as she lets out a yelp of surprise.

But she can't even finish talking as Himika lets out a grunt of exertion before throwing her sister towards a wall, making Mizuko let out a screech of surprise as she flies before she hits the wall with a heavy crashing noise and slides to the ground, before quickly getting back up with a disgruntled look on her face.
{i}O-OW!{/i} Sis, what the hell was that all about?!

But Himika doesn't immediately respond to Mizuko as she dusts off her hands with a smug look on her face, and Mizuko lets out a sigh as she stands back up and wipes the dust off her own body, looking none the worse for wear as she walks back towards the center of the ring. You can't help but notice that the wall she impacted looks totally fine as well...
You know, I just wanted to give [ThePlayerName] an example of the strength of red onis to prove that I absolutely am one in {i}every single aspect{/i} is all. That was the only reason.
Mizuko eventually makes it back to stand next to her sister, giving her quite the vengeful glare as Himika takes her moment to innocently smile at Mizuko.
...That's all it was, huh? I suppose if you're so intent on talking about how great red onis are, I should tell [ThePlayerName] a little bit about blue onis.
With an almost malicious smile, Mizuko turns her attention from her sister towards you as she brings her hand up to conceal her mouth from Himika before speaking in a stage whisper.

You've heard so much about red onis and how they're much more muscular than blue onis, but one of the greatest aspects of blue onis is that they tend to be much more magically inclined, not to mention the fact that we tend to be much smarter and mentally quicker on our feet, which means it's {i}so{/i} much easier to trick unsuspecting people.
Himika frowns with a confused look on her face for a moment as Mizuko brings her hand back down to innocently dust off her skin once more.
...U-Uh, sis...? You weren't talking about me, were you...?

Mizuko doesn't say a word as she gives Himika a large smile, but you can tell that she's already planning on how to get back against her sister from the look in her eyes as you quickly decide that you should probably change the subject before the situation gets worse...

EventText.NameOfScene: So about the massages at the brothel...
theScene: Mizuko chuckles as she languidly stretches her arms, fixing you with a sultry look as you flush while memories of your experiences in the brothel race through your mind.
Mmm... Don't tempt me, [ThePlayerName]. I might just ask you to give me one here and now...♥
Your attention is drawn away from Mizuko as Himika steps in between you and her sister, flushing ferociously as she angrily glares at her.
S-Sis! We're on the job right now! We can't afford to relax like that, even if [ThePlayerName] is really... U-Uhm...

Himika's face gets redder and redder as she talks before she suddenly trails off, and she takes in a deep breath before crouching down so she's at eye level with you and puts a hand on your shoulder, trying her best to look serious even as embarrassment dominates her expression.
music/Relaxing/Purple Planet Music - Gentle - Eastern Karma (2_16).mp3
H-Hey [ThePlayerName]...? Uhm, you really shouldn't force yourself to work at... {i}that{/i} kind of place, o-okay? I mean, if you want to, then that's fine, b-but... Well, what I mean is...
She manages to draw in another breath as her face gets increasingly flustered, even as her voice gets more and more impassioned.

If you don't want to work there or if you're getting forced into it somehow, just let me know at any time and I'll be sure to get you out of there, okay?! W-We can hide together, just the two of us, for months if we have to!

There's a long moment of silence as Himika's eyes burn with an almost frenzied intensity a scant few inches from your face as you try to process what's happening, only to be broken moments later as Mizuko walks up to your side and physically pushes you two apart with an amused smile and a sigh.
Wow, sis. I know you got swept up by the moment and everything, but that was one hell of a love confession, wasn't it?

Himika suddenly seems to snap out of her trance-like state as she jerks her head to stare at her sister, and her arms flail around as she tries, and fails, to speak several times with an incredibly deep flush.
WH-WH-WHAT?! Th-That was not- I-I was just saying-
Mizuko's smile only deepens as she watches her sister's panicked attempts to speak, chuckling to herself as her eyes gleam mischievously.

And really, 'just the two of us for months if we have to'? Trying to run off with him all by your lonesome? I believe that we promised we would {i}share{/i} our husband when we got one, sis. Are you really that in love with him to monopolize him like that?
Her sister's words make Himika freeze for a moment as she snaps her mouth shut before glaring at her sister with a haughty, exceedingly flushed and embarrassed look.
I-I'm {i}not{/i} trying to marry [ThePlayerName], sis! I-I'm just saying that if he's ever in a bad spot, I'll try to help him!
But her words don't do anything but make Mizuko's grin get even larger as she suddenly takes a step towards you and latches herself onto your arm.
Oh? Well, if you're not interested in him anymore, I guess that means that I can keep him for myself, hmm?
H-Huh?! NO! I mean- Not that- you and- me and- [TPN]-[ThePlayerName]... uh...

Himika can't seem to even attempt to speak anymore as her face gets so red it practically begins to steam, and her expression suddenly relaxes as she leans forwards and comically faceplants onto the ground, wordlessly murmuring to herself under her breath as Mizuko releases her grip on your arm and tentatively takes a step towards her sister.
Ah... I think I took it a little too far and, uh... Broke her. Oops. My bad.

Mizuko gently crouches down and helps her sister to her feet, and Himika barely even reacts as she just stares off into space with a completely dazed look on her face, and after making sure that she's not going to fall over again, Mizuko lets out a sigh and looks over at you for a moment with an apologetic smile.

She'll be fine in a moment, [ThePlayerName]. This isn't the first time that I've teased her to this point, after all. But I feel like I should let you know before my sister snaps out of her little trance that {i}both{/i} of us absolutely loved your massages.♥

You flush as Mizuko lets out a small, sultry giggle before she turns to Himika and gently pinches her side, making her let out a yelp of surprise as she suddenly recovers from her stupor before she powerfully blushes as memory of what just happened suddenly dawns on her.
A-Ah?! [TPN]-[ThePlayerName]! Forget about what just happened, o-okay? Let's talk about something else now!
As you express your concerns about the long term effects of Kotone's hypnosis sessions, Mizuko listens with a serious expression before letting out a heavy sigh and shaking her head.

Ugh... I understand that it's part of the will trials and everything to punish people who try to take the easy way through them, but she's {i}supposed{/i} to offer to remove the effects once you clear the trials. You're telling me she didn't do that?
You shake your head and Mizuko lets out another, much frostier sigh of irritation as she goes silent, and after a few moments Himika tentatively fidgets while watching her sister's face.
Uh... S-Sis? Didn't you already tell her to stop 'forgetting' to remove the hypnosis stuff...?
Himika hesitates at her sister's cold expression for a heartbeat, but continues to talk anyway with a small amount of trepidation in her voice.
A-And... She probably didn't remove it because she wanted to offer [ThePlayerName] the challenge she's been so fond of giving male adventurers, right?
Mizuko's voice remains cold and dispassionate as Himika promptly stops talking, and she turns her attention towards you as her eyes glimmer with restrained anger.
[ThePlayerName], Kotone is obligated and required to free you from her control if you so desire, so go remind her that she's supposed to remove it whenever you ask. If she continues to say no...
Mizuko slowly cracks her knuckles as she flashes you a smile utterly devoid of any happiness whatsoever.

A shiver runs down your spine as you find yourself unable to keep looking at Mizuko's face, and as you see Himika frantically signalling you to talk about something else out of the field of her sister's vision, you quickly decide it's a good idea and think about what to talk about next.
As you begin to talk about Kotone's hypnosis sessions and her 'challenge' she gave you, Mizuko's expression shifts from surprise, to disbelief, then to anger.

Wait just a fucking second- You're telling me that Kotone told you to effectively beat {i}both{/i} of us at the same time or else she wouldn't free you from her hypnosis?! She's {i}supposed{/i} to free you once you beat the will trials!
Himika tentatively takes a step forwards as she watches her sister's expression before gently starting to speak up.
Uh... Didn't you tell her to stop forcing people into that challenge?
Mizuko's jaw sets as her eyes flash dangerously, and her voice suddenly rings out a furious bellow that makes both you and Himika jump backwards involuntarily.
Yes, I {i}FUCKING DID! MANY GOD DAMN TIMES!{/i} And what does she do?! She does it {i}{b}AGAIN!{/b}{/i} UGGGHHH!
Himika instantly steps between you and her furious sister, looking as if she wants to protect you from Mizuko's rage as she tries to placate her.

Come on, sis, it can't be t-that bad, can it? She's just... You know, trying to find someone who meets her standards, like everyone else who lives here, right? Hers are just... Higher than normal, right?

But her words fall on deaf ears as Mizuko whirls towards Himika, and even though her attention isn't focused on you, you can't help but flinch from the sheer burning anger in her expression as she shoves a finger in her sister's chest.
Don't you {i}dare{/i} try to make excuses for her! I told her again and again not to do it, and she just {i}goes and does it anyway {b}just to spite me!{/b}{/i}
Himika looks like she's about to refute Mizuko's last claim, but stops when she sees the look in her eyes and shuts her mouth.

Several long moments pass as Mizuko slowly gets her anger under control, and once she does she lets out a small, angry sigh and takes a step backwards before fixing you with a serious, yet still slightly furious look.

[ThePlayerName], you're free to try out Kotone's 'challenge' if you want to, but you should know that she's obligated to free you from her control as soon as you finish the will trials. She told me that it was to make the will trials harder for people who were looking for an easy way through them, but she seems to think she can do whatever she wants. If she wants to complain, she's free to tell me about them in {i}person{/i}.

Mizuko glares at you for a few moments longer before she looks away and unclenches her hands with a strained sigh, making her anger slowly simmer away as you let out a breath of relief you didn't realize you were holding, and you try to think of what to talk about next.
As you question the oni sisters about why they have the two different kind of sigils, Mizuko awkwardly scratches the back of her neck.

Well... There's two reasons, really, although they both go hand in hand. The first is that the true sigil is one of a kind, so it's not like we can give it out to everyone if there's only one, right? And the second is that adventurers wouldn't want to leave empty handed, so there needed to be {i}some{/i} reward for them.
Yeah, and the copies do their job for granting people access to the Demon Queen's castle anyway, so it's not like it's a big deal to hand out the duplicates.
Mizuko pauses for a brief moment as a shadow of uncertainty crosses her face, and she leans towards you as her voice drops in volume.

You should be proud that you managed to earn it by defeating both of us at the same time, but do us a favor and don't go waving it around, all right? We're technically supposed to be guarding it and {i}not{/i} giving it away, so we're going to get in trouble if people like the Black Knight find out about what we did.
Both Himika and Mizuko frown as they stare off into the distance as they clearly seem to be remembering something, but within seconds Himika's eyes focus back on you as she grins.
Yeah, it'd be great if you could keep it a secret, okay? And uh, if you happen to find the real will sigil on your adventure, feel free to keep it for yourself, alright?
Mizuko's frown deepens as she stares at her sister for a long moment before letting out a sigh tilting her head to one side with a quizzical look.

I know I give you shit for losing it and all, but I really do wonder where that thing went. We've looked {i}everywhere{/i} for it, and we couldn't find so much of a trace of it. It's weird, because the power sigil was completely untouched...
Ahh, I'm sure it'll turn up eventually. It's fine, isn't it?

Despite Himika's offhanded tone of voice, you can easily tell that she's somewhat embarrassed about losing the sigil from the color of her cheeks, and it's clear to see that Mizuko doesn't buy it either as she gives her sister a flat look.
It's really not, sis. But with how much time we've both spent in looking for it without success, I don't think there's that much else we can do.

EventText.NameOfScene: Ask to fuck the oni sisters.
theScene: Mizuko's face breaks out into a huge, sultry grin while Himika flushes as one of her hands begins to nervously play with her loincloth.
Oh? You don't want to bother trying to fight us this time, you just want to have sex? How... Forward of you.
Himika's flush deepens as her eyes flit up to meet yours, and you can see a hint of lust, masked by embarrassment, in her expression.
W-Well... I still think it'd be better if he fought us first though...
Mizuko glances towards her sister as her grin deepens with a small chuckle.
I didn't realize you were so into foreplay, sis. I guess if you're not interested in letting [ThePlayerName] fuck you, I suppose that means I can have him {i}all{/i} to myself.
Wh- That's not what I meant!
Her laugh deepens further as she looks over at you once more, and as you see the lust growing in their eyes, you can't help but feel a flare of arousal shoot through you.
You enter the glowing circle and are fully refreshed!
You've been restored by restorative healing magic too recently, you'll have to wait a day before it works again.
You take a moment to rest by the healing circle.

EventText.NameOfScene: Go back to the kunoichi training hall.
theScene: You turn around and walk back up the small flight of stairs leading to the large doors leading back into the grand kunoichi hallway, pushing through the doors with a small huff of effort.

You're standing at the top of a large flight of stairs at one end of a grand hallway, and a wooden pathway extends from the bottom of the stairs all the way to the other side with what appears to be a sparring ring at the halfway point and ending at a large set of double doors that leads back to the entrance of the dungeon, and a series of large and intricately carved blue and red pillars line the right and left sides of the pathway respectively.
